chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: What's up guys, you guys are here in 11th video

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: We have completed 10 videos in sigma web development course

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So 1 like is enough for everyone's consistency

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: In today's video we will see about Semantic Tags

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Because SEO is very important

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: And to understand the overall website structure

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Search engines are very happy to see this structure

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: That means overall SEO of your website will be very good

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: If you use these tags

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: What are these tags, why are they there, how to use them

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: What are the benefits we will see in this video

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Let's go to the computer screen

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Let's roll the intro

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So guys, first of all I would like to tell you about Semantic Tags

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Here you can see that I have made a folder named Video 11

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: And here I have set the title of the index.html boilerplate template

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: And set the image of the h1 and I am going to preview it here

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So this is the image, to explain a little bit

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: I will tell you what are Semantic Tags

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Semantic Tags is a tool that tells the browser and web crawlers

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Which wants to understand your website properly

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: And tells them what is the content of your website

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: And what is the purpose of the tag

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Even if you don't use Semantic Tags in html

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Then also your work will be done

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: It's not like if you don't use Semantic Tags

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Then your website will not look good

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: You can do a good job designing your website

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: But we want to explain Google and Bing search engines

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: About our website

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: And if we explain them about our website

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Then they will understand our website

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: And they will rank our website on Google, Bing

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: And respective search engines

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: And we want crawlers to understand our website

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: And we want that whoever wants to understand our website

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: They can understand it properly

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: There are many tags like header, nav, main, article, figure

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: These are all special tags in html

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Which helps in structuring your website

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Now if there is something in header

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Then I know that it's header, it's top

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: If there is something in footer, then I will understand

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: That the website has started ending and the footer has started

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: This footer could have been div

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: But no, if I am using Semantic html

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Then I will not make my navigation bar in span tag

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: This time I will not make my navigation bar in span tag

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: I will make my navigation bar in nav tag

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So these kind of differences

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Explain our search engines very well

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: About our website

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So I will show you some examples of Semantic Tags

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: And I hope you understood what Semantic Tags are

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Now there are download folders of our computer

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So download folder is like

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: All the files of the world are in that folder

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: 90% of your computer files are in download folder

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: But we should not do this

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Some people go to the extent that they start

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Spreading files in their local disk C

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: And some people keep files in system32

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So if you spread your files

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: In your computer, then it definitely

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Doesn't work in one way

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: But if you arrange your files in folders

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: If you want to keep secret files in a folder

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Then you can put secret files

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: You can make a folder called do not open this

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: If you can put your files in it

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: It will be arranged in one way

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: You have arranged your images in one way

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: You have arranged your videos in one way

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So to understand this, it will be better

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: That folder structure instead of

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: If you are spreading your files throughout the computer

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: You definitely don't want to spread your files

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So I hope you understood why we use Semantic Tags

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: It is very good for SEO

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: I haven't used the word SEO yet

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: But SEO is a very important part of search engine optimization

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: To use Semantic Tags

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So I make my website the way I make it

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: You use some special tags

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: For example, let's say I am making this website

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: I will comment out the image

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: What are Semantic Tags

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: I will make a navbar

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: First of all, I will say this is my website header

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: I will make a nav in this

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: I will make an unordered list

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: I am writing a lot of things

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: And this is my header

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So anyone who comes to my website will understand

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: This is my header, home, about, contact

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: I can write whatever I want

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: This is my header, navbar, nav tags

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: I will write about here

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: And I will write contact here

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So I wrote home, about and contact

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So you understood this

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Now if I want to make a footer

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: I will use main tag

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: And then I will write

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Copyright, CWH

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: And here I will write

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: All rights reserved

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: So here I have written

chunks.title: Semantic Tags in HTML Sigma Web Development
chunks.text: Copyright, all rights reserved
